name: ntfy-vscode-listener
description: Bidirectional phone-to-VS Code bridge via ntfy.sh — forward terminal prompts to your phone, respond from anywhere.

ntfyListener.serverUrl.description: ntfy server base URL. Point to a self-hosted instance for maximum security.

ntfyListener.topic.description: ntfy topic name. Use a long random string (e.g. UUID) — this is your first line of defence.

ntfyListener.autoStart.description: Automatically start listener when VS Code opens.

ntfyListener.requirePassword.description: When true, messages must start with 'keyword: ' to trigger terminal injection. When false, all messages are read-only notifications.

ntfyListener.terminalInjectionEnabled.description: Allow injecting text into the active terminal.

ntfyListener.maxMessagesPerMinute.description: Rate limit: max authenticated commands per minute.

ntfyListener.notifyOnClaudeStop.description: When Claude Code stops and awaits input, automatically push a notification to your phone.
